action_set_definitions.name: get_system_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves general environment information including current_time, operating_hours, and any active global constraints like kitchen pacing levels.

action_set_definitions.name: get_tables_info
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves a list of all tables in the restaurant, including their IDs, maximum seating capacity, and current availability.

min_capacity.description: Optional filter for minimum table capacity.

action_set_definitions.name: get_reservation_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the list of currently confirmed reservations with party names, IDs, guest counts, and assigned time slots.

action_set_definitions.name: get_waitlist_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current waitlist, including party names, IDs, guest counts, and VIP status.

action_set_definitions.name: update_reservation
action_set_definitions.description: Modifies the time slot or table assignment of an existing confirmed reservation.

reservation_id.description: The unique ID of the reservation to update.

new_time.description: The new reservation time in HH:MM format.

new_table_id.description: The new table ID to assign.

action_set_definitions.name: seat_from_waitlist
action_set_definitions.description: Converts a waitlist entry into a confirmed seated reservation by assigning a table and a specific time.

waitlist_id.description: The ID of the party from the waitlist.

table_id.description: The ID of the table to assign to the party.

scheduled_time.description: The time the party will be seated (HH:MM).

state_description.tables: A list of table objects including their ID, seating capacity, and current availability status.
state_description.active_reservations: A list of currently confirmed reservations with customer details and time slots.
state_description.current_time: The current system time in HH:MM format used to validate reservation windows.
state_description.operating_hours: The opening and closing times of the restaurant.
state_description.waitlist: A queue of customers waiting for a table when the restaurant is at full capacity.
